directionValidation.reviewNote: Intermediate-axis warnings were accepted after all four hard cardinal gates passed and labeled normal-size loop review confirmed the intended quadrants without reversal.

visualDesign.face: dark rigid visor with luminous cyan eyes and dimensional helmet articulation
visualDesign.body: layered silver and copper armour with bevels, recessed joints, occlusion, and material roughness variation
visualDesign.wings: translucent faceted cyan crystal wings with coherent front-to-back parallax
visualDesign.lighting: restrained cyan emission with consistent material response and readable depth separation

movementValidation.directionalTravel: alternating articulated rightward gait with deterministic mirrored leftward cadence
movementValidation.activeWork: focused visor, head, hand, and body articulation without literal travel gait
movementValidation.lookMechanics: eyes lead; rigid helmet and visor follow; torso and wings add restrained parallax

continuity.reviewNote: Metric warnings were visually reviewed; crystalline-wing openings, occlusion, and parallax remain coherent with no snap, scale pop, clipping, identity drift, or broken attachment.
